name: mailto-with-subject-and-body-drops-body
description: mailto with both subject and body query params; body is dropped intentionally.

spec.behavior: Intentional divergence: senders sometimes encode the unsubscribe message in ?body=. Including it would let clients silently send pre-canned text on the user's behalf; we drop it. Documented in the crate README under 'Intentional divergences'.
